name: uxu-code
description: Unified UXUCode engineering workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Unified engineering workflows and release gates
interface.longDescription: Use UXUCode workflows from specification through release with minimal correct implementations, verification evidence, and concise technical output.
defaultPrompt: Use the appropriate engineering workflow skills to implement this task.
Review this change for correctness and over-engineering.
Find the smallest correct implementation and verify it.
